title: plectranthus maculosus
intro: Plectranthus maculosus, also known as Coleus forskohlii, is a plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. The plant's roots contain a compound called forskolin, which has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular benefits. The health benefits of Plectranthus maculosus include lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing weight loss, as well as its potential to treat conditions such as asthma and glaucoma. Forskolin extracts can be found in various herbal preparations, including capsules, tablets, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine and dietary supplements.
